rationale: The definition is structural: a counterexample is given relative to an argument form (Gamma, phi) (def:argument-form, missing) and is a truth assignment (present) that 'satisfies every premise ... and does not satisfy phi' (def:satisfaction-propositional-formula, missing). Both constituents added.
notes: def:valid-argument-form is kept but flagged: a counterexample assignment is the dual/negation-witness of validity, not something defined via it -- both notions are independently built from argument-form + satisfaction + truth-assignment. The edge may be a see-also link; reviewer may drop it. No cycle: validity (0014) does not depend back on counterexample.
